phases.title: Install deps + foundation libs
commits: feat: P0 — install CodeMirror 6 + create foundation libs
refactor: extract VFS path constants + SKILLS_PREAMBLE to lib/constants, remove SLASH_COMMANDS
notes: SLASH_COMMANDS removed from lib/constants.ts — replaced by dynamic prompts (P6)
VFS path constants extracted: CEBIAN_HOME, CEBIAN_PROMPTS_DIR, CEBIAN_SKILLS_DIR, SKILL_ENTRY_FILE
SKILLS_PREAMBLE constant added for agent injection
gray-matter used instead of hand-written YAML parser

phases.title: CodeMirror editor components
commits: feat: P1 — CodeMirror 6 editor wrapper + template highlight/completion extensions
notes: Uses Compartment for theme/readOnly — no editor recreation on toggle
Template vars: MatchDecorator for {{var}} highlighting, autocomplete on {{ trigger
defaultHighlightStyle with { fallback: true } to avoid clash with oneDark

phases.title: AI Config Dialog UI
commits: refactor: EditorPanel — remove detectMode/resolveFullPath/tab, use explicit mode + full VFS path
refactor: remove EditorMode — EditorPanel is now a pure file editor
refactor: extract useIsDark hook, add FileTree with context menu, replace SkillTree with SkillList + workspace EditorPanel
notes: EditorPanel supports optional 'workspace' prop — shows embedded FileTree when set
SkillTree replaced by SkillList (simple folder list) + FileTree (reusable, with right-click context menu)
EditorMode removed entirely — EditorPanel is a pure file editor, no frontmatter parsing
FileTree supports: right-click context menu (new file/folder, rename, delete), inline rename, collision detection

phases.title: Header + Dialog registration
commits: feat: P3 — Header button + dialog registration
notes: Blocks icon button added to Header between theme toggle and settings
AIConfigDialog registered as 'ai-config' in dialog registry
App.tsx calls showDialog('ai-config', {}) on button click
AIConfigDialog reads theme internally via useIsDark — no props needed
sm:max-w-xl removed from dialog.tsx base to allow full-width dialogs

phases.title: Agent injection (skill index)
phases.description: Modify agent-manager.ts buildStructuredMessage() to scan VFS skills and inject full index into <agent-config><skills> block

phases.title: execute_skill_code tool
phases.description: New tool for executing skill scripts in background SW with declared chrome.* permissions (oil-monkey model)

phases.title: Prompt / command panel
phases.description: Replace removed SLASH_COMMANDS with dynamic VFS prompt scan + template variable substitution in ChatInput

phases.title: Build verification + final review
phases.description: Full build, code review all changes, update design doc

architectureDecisions.skillInjection: Full index in every user message <agent-config><skills> block
architectureDecisions.themeManagement: useIsDark hook (shared between App.tsx and dialogs)
architectureDecisions.editorPanel: Generic file editor with optional workspace prop for embedded FileTree
architectureDecisions.noInstructions: Instructions module removed — Settings system prompt covers the use case
architectureDecisions.noSlashCommands: SLASH_COMMANDS removed — unified under dynamic prompts mechanism
